title: Emphatic victory for Badgers Women
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers recorded an emphatic three-wicket victory against Western Province at the Recreation Ground in Oudtshoorn on Saturday. This was the Badgers' first victory against Western Province in the Cricket South Africa Hollywoodbets Pro 50 series.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers recorded an emphatic three-wicket victory against Western Province at the Recreation Ground in Oudtshoorn on Saturday. This was the Badgers' first victory against Western Province in the Cricket South Africa Hollywoodbets Pro 50 series."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Badgers Women, thanks to a brilliant unbeaten 95* (from 71 balls; 5x6, 11x4) from Jana Nell, reached a competitive target with five overs to spare.","html":"The Badgers Women, thanks to a brilliant unbeaten 95* (from 71 balls; 5x6, 11x4) from Jana Nell, reached a competitive target with five overs to spare."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Nell bulldozed the Badgers to victory with some power hitting after Western Province was dismissed for 209 (all out)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the Pro20 match, the former Protea international Dané van Niekerk scored a century (100 from 64 balls; 4x6, 12x4) and in an opening partnership of 165 for the first wicket with Faye Tunnicliffe (73), enabled Western Province to 194/2. In a disappointing run chase, the Badgers were dismissed for 85 as Western Province won by 109 runs.","html":"In the Pro20 match, the former Protea international Dané van Niekerk scored a century (100 from 64 balls; 4x6, 12x4) and in an opening partnership of 165 for the first wicket with Faye Tunnicliffe (73), enabled Western Province to 194/2. In a disappointing run chase, the Badgers were dismissed for 85 as Western Province won by 109 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The summarised score cards are:","html":"The summarised score cards are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pro 50 match","html":"Pro 50 match"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Western Province 209 all out - 48.2 overs (Faye Tunnicliffe 52, Kelsy Adams 32, Dané van Niekerk 20, Tatum le Roux 20*, Gizelle Abrahams 3/36, Jana Nell 2/32, Khayakze Mathe 2/21, Micaela Andrews 2/36)","html":"Western Province 209 all out - 48.2 overs (Faye Tunnicliffe 52, Kelsy Adams 32, Dané van Niekerk 20, Tatum le Roux 20*, Gizelle Abrahams 3/36, Jana Nell 2/32, Khayakze Mathe 2/21, Micaela Andrews 2/36)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Garden Route Badgers 211/7 - 45 overs (Jana Nell 95*, Asakhe Nyovane 24, Micaela Andrews 22, Rifqua Esau 3/66, Tatum le Roux 2/46)","html":"Garden Route Badgers 211/7 - 45 overs (Jana Nell 95*, Asakhe Nyovane 24, Micaela Andrews 22, Rifqua Esau 3/66, Tatum le Roux 2/46)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Garden Route Badgers won by 3 wickets","html":"Garden Route Badgers won by 3 wickets"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pro 20 match","html":"Pro 20 match"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Western Province 194/2 – 20 overs (Faye Tunnicliffe 73, Dané van Niekerk 100)","html":"Western Province 194/2 – 20 overs (Faye Tunnicliffe 73, Dané van Niekerk 100)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Garden Route Badgers 85 – 17 overs (Nadine Moodley 32, Rifqua Esau 3/17, Leah Jones 3/19)","html":"Garden Route Badgers 85 – 17 overs (Nadine Moodley 32, Rifqua Esau 3/17, Leah Jones 3/19)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Western Province won by 109 runs","html":"Western Province won by 109 runs"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
